title: WIP: Sequential GPTQ with Groupwise Int6 — improved post-training quantization on SP4096 base
author: zoharb157

data.description: Sequential cross-layer GPTQ propagation: quantize layers one at a time, inject quantized weights back into the model, and collect Hessians for later layers using quantized activations.
Groupwise int6 scales with group size 128, using per-group fp16 scales instead of per-row scales.
Hessian-weighted scale selection that minimizes weighted reconstruction error using Hessian diagonal terms.

novel_contributions: Post-training quantization improvements with zero training-time cost
